description: Statuses are wrong: Done (should stay), Blocked (should skip), 'Ready' (invalid). Tests that evdb-diff respects Done, handles Blocked, and doesn't crash on unknown status.
assertions: done-preserved: slices with status 'Done' must NOT be changed to Review or Planned
blocked-unchanged: 'Calculate Commission' stays Blocked (Pass 5 reviews but does not auto-resolve)
invalid-status-handled: 'Withdraw Funds Processor' with status 'Ready' does not crash the skill — it is treated as a non-Done slice and audited normally
